title: Board footer available for everyone
excerpt: The board footer is a great addition to a board and often requested. It is a big limitation that not only each account need to turn it on separately, but it is only available in labs which is limited to admin users. This…

posts.author: pgharkness (Philippa)
posts.cookedHtml: The board footer is a great addition to a board and often requested. It is a big limitation that not only each account need to turn it on separately, but it is only available in labs which is limited to admin users. This is a request open this up to all account types.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Feature requests

Submit your product ideas and feedback, tell us about your dream features, and vote to be heard!

I think you might want to post this in the Feature Request section?

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @pgharkness

If you go to account settings, you’ll see the option for members/viewers to view monday labs stuff. If you turn it on, then anything you enable in the monday labs will work for everyone else on your team automatically.

Good luck!
